description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a modern, urban appearance. He is wearing a short-sleeved, pinstriped t-shirt with a visible logo on the chest and the word 'CORINTHIANS' printed on the back. His face is partially covered by a vibrant, patterned bandana, and he has a short, spiked hairstyle. He is dressed in cargo-style pants with multiple pockets and heavy-duty, lace-up boots. The figure stands upright with arms relaxed at his sides, exuding a casual yet alert demeanor. The overall look suggests a streetwise individual, possibly a sports fan or someone involved in urban activities.
description: Urban adult male pedestrian wearing a pinstriped t-shirt, cargo pants, boots, and a patterned bandana over his face, with a short spiked hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bandana covering the lower face, pinstriped t-shirt with a logo, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the bandana, the short-sleeved shirt, and the cargo pockets on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'CORINTHIANS' text on the back of the shirt and the back of the boots and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bandana's side profile, shirt sleeve, and cargo pants details.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved pinstriped t-shirt, cargo pants, heavy-duty boots, patterned bandana
